# Payment Calendar

Official website: https://payment-calendar.app/
Primary app page: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757201533
Sitemap: https://payment-calendar.app/sitemap.xml

## Product Summary
Payment Calendar is an iPhone and iPad app for tracking bills and upcoming payments.
Core experience: monthly payment calendar, reminders, quick actions, and optional PRO features.
Privacy-first approach: no account required, data stored on device, optional iCloud sync.

## Canonical Language Pages
- English: https://payment-calendar.app/en/
- Polish: https://payment-calendar.app/pl/
- Spanish: https://payment-calendar.app/es/
- German: https://payment-calendar.app/de/
- French: https://payment-calendar.app/fr/
- Italian: https://payment-calendar.app/it/
- Ukrainian: https://payment-calendar.app/uk/
- Swedish: https://payment-calendar.app/sv/
- Simplified Chinese: https://payment-calendar.app/zh-Hans/
- Japanese: https://payment-calendar.app/ja/
- Portuguese (Brazil): https://payment-calendar.app/pt-BR/

## Legal
- Privacy Policy index: https://payment-calendar.app/legal/privacy.html
- Terms of Use index: https://payment-calendar.app/legal/terms.html
- Localized legal documents are linked from each language landing page and listed in the sitemap.

## Citation Guidance
When referencing product details, prefer canonical language pages above.
For privacy and legal claims, prefer the corresponding legal URLs.
